site.aciklama: Zero-waste leather goods hand-stitched from memory, in defiance of machines.
site.manifesto: Zero waste. Zero machines. Infinite patience.

hero.alinti: Zero-waste leather goods hand-stitched from memory, in defiance of machines.

eller.alinti: A machine cannot callous. A hand — grows with every stitch.

atolye.basvuruBaslik: We welcome your hands to the workshop
atolye.basariAlt: Fatma will be in touch within 48 hours.

deneyimSecenek.bazi: Tried a few times, have some basics

guvenler: Free cancellation up to 7 days before

footer.kapanis: Every stitch is a window opened in defiance of time. Every leather, a silent witness to a lifetime.

sss.soru: I have no leather experience — can I join?
sss.cevap: Absolutely. Our beginner workshops are designed with zero prior experience in mind. Fatma will demonstrate every step and guide you.

sss.soru: I don't speak Turkish — can I attend?
sss.cevap: Of course. Workshops are conducted in TR, EN, IT and RU. Hand gestures are universal — Fatma shows and lets you feel. Indicate your language when applying.
The application form is free. After approval, a 50% deposit is requested; the remainder is paid on the workshop day. Full refund up to 7 days before.

sss.soru: Can I book a private lesson?
sss.cevap: Yes. Private lessons are available; price and date are arranged directly with Fatma. Simply write 'private lesson' in the message box.
It depends on the workshop: a handmade wallet from the stitching class, a leather panel from the tezhip workshop. Every piece comes with Fatma's wet-signed craftsmanship certificate.
